queries.question: For every traffic simulator, list the applications used.
queries.sql: select traffic_simulators.simulator_name , applications.application_name from Traffic_Simulators join Traffic_Simulators_Applications on Traffic_Simulators.simulator_id = Traffic_Simulators_Applications.traffic_simulator_id join Applications on Traffic_Simulators_Applications.application_id = Applications.application_id

queries.question: What applications are common to all traffic simulators?
queries.sql: SELECT Applications.application_name  from Traffic_Simulators join Traffic_Simulators_Applications on Traffic_Simulators.simulator_id = Traffic_Simulators_Applications.traffic_simulator_id join Applications on Traffic_Simulators_Applications.application_id = Applications.application_id   GROUP BY Traffic_Simulators_Applications.application_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Traffic_Simulators_Applications.traffic_simulator_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Traffic_Simulators)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the applications each traffic simulator uses.
